title: Stainless Steel Cooking Pot – Induction Hob Stockpot with Glass Lid – Oven Safe Non Stick Dutch Oven – 32cm 11.8L – by Nuovva
features: SPACIOUS STOCKPOT: With a generous 11.8L capacity, our stockpot is ideal for boiling, simmering, making soups, stews, and pasta. Its deep design allows for even cooking, making it a must-have for home cooks and professional kitchens alike!

INDUCTION COMPATIBLE & EASY TO MAINTAIN: Compatible with all stovetops, including induction, gas, electric, and open flame. The Nuovva satin-polished stainless steel finish resists discolouration and ensures easy maintenance. Dishwasher safe for hassle-free cleaning and long-lasting shine!

STABLE RIVETED HANDLES: The securely riveted handles by Nuovva provide a secure strong grip for confident cooking. Designed to stay cool on the stovetop, they ensure safe and comfortable handling. With a blend of durability and modern elegance, they offer both strength and style!

GLASS LID WITH STAINLESS STEEL KNOB: The clear transparent lid allows for easy observing without losing heat or moisture. Designed for high-temperature resistance, it helps lock in flavours while cooking. The stainless steel knob provides a solid, secure grip for easy handling and a minimal modern look!

DURABLE TRI-PLY STAINLESS STEEL: Created with a three-layer design by Nuovva (304 stainless steel + aluminium + 430 stainless steel) for superior heat efficiency. The aluminium core ensures quick even heat distribution, while the stainless steel interior and exterior provide durability and a sleek, polished finish, perfect for high-performance cooking!
